name: Foamy Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the yolks of the eggs.
2. Add seasonings and milk to the beaten egg yolks.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Place a skillet on a large burner.
5. Add butter to the skillet and set the heat to medium high.
6. Once the butter is melted, lower the heat to low.
7. Ensure the bottom and sides of the skillet are well greased.
8. Gently fold the stiffly beaten egg whites into the yolk mixture.
9. Pour the omelet batter into the hot skillet.
10. Cook the omelet slowly until it is set.
11. Place the omelet in an oven preheated to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
12. Allow the omelet to dry slightly on top, then turn off the heat and serve immediately.
13. Optionally, fold in finely minced ham, grated cheese, or chopped parsley before serving.
Serves 4.
